items.title: 'The spectacle Iran wants the world to see': Lyse Doucet in Tehran
items.dek: Huge crowds have lined the streets of Tehran for the funeral procession of Iran's late supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
items.body: Huge crowds have lined the streets of Tehran for the funeral procession of Iran's late supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
